FUNCTIONALITY DESCRIPTION: Motion alarm_Event assign_Only multi-monitor toggle enabled in salvo
TEST CASE DESCRIPTION: Verify that assigning a motion alarm automatically opens the alarm workflow in Talos and loads the corresponding alarm quad automatically in Salvo.
EXPECTED RESULT:
Alarm workflow opens automatically in Talos

Alarm quad is automatically loaded and displayed in Salvo

TEST CASE DESCRIPTION: Verify that the alarm quad is automatically loaded in Salvo when a motion alarm is assigned, even if the user is already viewing other live cameras using drag and drop.
EXPECTED RESULT:
Current live camera view is replaced or updated

Alarm quad loads automatically without user intervention

correctly behavior: Both auto stream and multi-monitor enabled in salvo
TEST CASE DESCRIPTION: Verify that cancelling the assigned motion alarm using the cancel “X” icon closes the workflow popup in Talos and closes the alarm quad in Salvo.
EXPECTED RESULT:
Workflow popup is closed in Talos

Alarm quad is closed in Salvo

correctly behavior: Both autostream and multi-monitor set off
TEST CASE DESCRIPTION: Verify that closing the alarm workflow from Talos closes the corresponding alarm quad opened in Salvo.
EXPECTED RESULT:
Workflow is closed in Talos

Alarm quad is closed in Salvo

correctly behavior: Two salvo scenario- One salvo with multi-monitor enabled and other salvo with auto stream enabled
TEST CASE DESCRIPTION: Verify that opening the same motion alarm again or assigning a new motion alarm automatically opens the alarm quad in Talos and loads it in Salvo.
EXPECTED RESULT:
Alarm workflow opens correctly in Talos

Corresponding alarm quad loads automatically in Salvo

No leftover state from previous alarms

TEST CASE DESCRIPTION: Verify that closing the Talos application clears the alarm quad from Talos and closes any associated alarm quad in Salvo.
EXPECTED RESULT:
No alarm quad remains active

No workflow or alarm state remains after Talos is closed

TEST CASE DESCRIPTION: Alarm without Zone when no zones exist in GCX and Talos
EXPECTED RESULT:
Alarm is received successfully

System treats the alarm as site-level

Live streams from all sensors under the site are started

No errors occur

TEST CASE DESCRIPTION: Alarm with random Zone when no zones exist in GCX and Talos
EXPECTED RESULT:
Zone value is ignored

Alarm is treated as site-level

All sensors under the site are streamed

TEST CASE DESCRIPTION: Alarm without Zone when Zone exists only in GCX
EXPECTED RESULT:
Alarm is treated as site-level

All sensors under the site are streamed

TEST CASE DESCRIPTION: Alarm with Zone matching GCX when Zone exists only in GCX
EXPECTED RESULT:
System matches zone using GCX configuration

Only sensors mapped to Zone 55 are streamed

TEST CASE DESCRIPTION: Alarm with random Zone not configured in GCX
EXPECTED RESULT:
Zone value is ignored

Alarm is treated as site-level

All sensors under the site are streamed

TEST CASE DESCRIPTION: Alarm without Zone when Zone exists only in Talos
EXPECTED RESULT:
No zone mapping is found in GCX

Alarm is treated as site-level

All sensors under the site are streamed

TEST CASE DESCRIPTION: Alarm with Zone configured only in Talos
EXPECTED RESULT:
No matching zone found in GCX

No sensor-to-zone mapping exists

No streams are started OR fallback to site-level streaming (as per system design)

TEST CASE DESCRIPTION: Alarm with random Zone configured nowhere
EXPECTED RESULT:
Zone value is ignored

Alarm is treated as site-level

All sensors under the site are streamed

TEST CASE DESCRIPTION: Alarm without Zone when Zones exist in both GCX and Talos
EXPECTED RESULT:
Alarm is treated as site-level

All sensors under the site are streamed

TEST CASE DESCRIPTION: Alarm with Zone configured in both GCX and Talos
EXPECTED RESULT:
System correctly matches zone

Only sensors mapped to Zone 33 are streamed

TEST CASE DESCRIPTION: Alarm with Zone configured only for sensors in GCX
EXPECTED RESULT:
System uses GCX zone configuration

Sensors mapped to Zone 4 are streamed

TEST CASE DESCRIPTION: Alarm with Zone configured in GCX but not in Talos
EXPECTED RESULT:
System matches zone using GCX

Only sensors mapped to Zone 55 are streamed
